title: Grok
html:
Grok

xAI's AI assistant. Tracked by Rankett's AI visibility engine alongside OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, and DeepSeek — completes the audited-LLM lineup that Rankett shows in every audit UI.

Where it surfaces

  • 2026 01 07 rankett meetup prep guide — Rankett meetup prep names Grok in the provider lineup
  • 2026 01 11 rankett meetup prep revised — revised prep, Grok retained

Why it matters

Grok is the fifth chair in Rankett's audit UI — without it, the lineup feels OpenAI-Anthropic-Google-centric (an SF-coast shape). With Grok + DeepSeek, Rankett audits the full geopolitical map of frontier LLMs (US-establishment + xAI + Chinese). For a small startup that's a deliberate positioning choice — Yahir's audit covers what clients will actually be queried in, not just what's safe to track.

Connections

rankett · ai visibility engine · openai · anthropic claude · google ai overviews · deepseek · chatgpt · aeo agency
